version_description: I wrote the tab to be played with the guitar tuned the way Morgan plays in which is half step down.

versions.version_description: This version is different than the original song because in the song he picks the guitar and these are just the simple chords.

tuning: Eb Ab Db Gb Bb Eb
content:
